---
title: "After the Workshop"
---

## Continuing your learning

After the workshop, participants are encouraged to:

- Re-run all coding exercises from a clean R session.
- Complete the capstone exercise.
- Adapt one example model to their own research question.
- Explore the recommended packages and resources.

## Certificate information

Add certificate requirements here, if applicable.

## Community resources

Add links to relevant decision modeling communities, mailing lists, and future training opportunities.
